ucb1.comment: UCB1 exploration constant. c=0.5 balances exploration and exploitation for short simulations (~120-180s with ~4s segments = ~30-45 pulls). Theoretical guarantee: O(sqrt(K*T*log(T))) regret bound holds for any c>0.

linucb.comment: LinUCB (Li et al. 2010) with arm-indicator features. d=14 env context dim; d_total = n_arms + d. alpha=0.3 tightens the confidence ellipsoid so the algorithm exploits the learned theta after initial exploration. Typical values in literature: 0.2-0.5 for normalised contexts.

thompson_sampling.comment: Contextual Thompson Sampling with online logistic updates and diagonal Laplace approximation.

ppo_hybrid.comment: Hybrid PPO selector for adaptive bitrate choice and steering order.

sac_hybrid.comment: Hybrid SAC selector for adaptive bitrate choice and content steering.

random.comment: Selects a random server at each step. Baseline for exploration-only behavior.

best.comment: Always selects the server with the lowest observed latency. Oracle upper-bound baseline.
